parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        po.id AS organisation_id,
        po.name AS organisation_name,
        po.active AS organisation_active,
        cps.id AS product_source_id,
        cps.product_id,
        cps.name AS product_name,
        cps.preferred,
        cps.source,
        cps.raw_release_date,
        cps.release_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN po.name ILIKE $1 THEN 1
            WHEN po.name ILIKE $1 || ' %' 
              OR po.name ILIKE '% ' || $1 
              OR po.name ILIKE '% ' || $1 || ' %' THEN 2
            ELSE 3
        END AS name_match_priority
    FROM public.publisher_organisations po
    JOIN public.catalogue_meta_data cmd
        ON cmd.publisher_organisation_id = po.id
    JOIN public.catalogue_product_meta_data cpmd
        ON cpmd.meta_data_id = cmd.id
    JOIN public.catalogue_products cp
        ON cp.id = cpmd.product_id
    JOIN public.catalogue_product_sources cps
        ON cps.product_id = cp.id
    WHERE po.name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
      AND po.active = 'true'
      AND cps.preferred = true
),
best_match AS (
    SELECT MIN(name_match_priority) AS best_priority
    FROM base
),
classified AS (
    SELECT b.*,
        CASE
            WHEN b.release_date IS NOT NULL 
                AND b.release_date > CASE 
                    WHEN '{{ $('TRIGGER').item.json.today }}' = 'Excluded' 
                        THEN CURRENT_DATE
                    ELSE CURRENT_DATE - 1
                END
                THEN 1
            WHEN b.release_date IS NULL
                AND b.raw_release_date ~* '^Q[1-4]\s+\d{4}$'
                AND (
                    MAKE_DATE(
                        CAST(SPLIT_PART(b.raw_release_date, ' ', 2) AS INT),
                        (CAST(SUBSTRING(b.raw_release_date FROM 2 FOR 1) AS INT)) * 3,
                        1
                    ) >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
                )
                THEN 2
            WHEN b.release_date IS NULL
                AND b.raw_release_date ~ '^\d{4}$'
                AND CAST(b.raw_release_date AS INT) >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
                THEN 3
            WHEN b.release_date IS NULL
                AND b.raw_release_date ~* 'coming\s+soon'
                AND (
                    CASE 
                        WHEN b.raw_release_date ~ '\d{4}' 
                        THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(b.raw_release_date FROM '\d{4}') AS INT) >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
                        ELSE TRUE
                    END
                )
                THEN 4
            WHEN b.release_date IS NULL
                AND b.raw_release_date ~* '(to\s+be\s+announced|tba|tbd)'
                AND (
                    CASE 
                        WHEN b.raw_release_date ~ '\d{4}' 
                        THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(b.raw_release_date FROM '\d{4}') AS INT) >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
                        ELSE TRUE
                    END
                )
                THEN 5
            ELSE NULL
        END AS release_priority
    FROM base b
    JOIN best_match bm ON b.name_match_priority = bm.best_priority
),
deduplicated AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (product_id) *
    FROM classified
    WHERE release_priority IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY
        product_id,
        release_priority,
        CASE
            WHEN release_priority = 1 THEN release_date - CURRENT_DATE
            WHEN release_priority = 2 THEN ABS(
                MAKE_DATE(
                    CAST(SPLIT_PART(raw_release_date, ' ', 2) AS INT),
                    (CAST(SUBSTRING(raw_release_date FROM 2 FOR 1) AS INT) - 1) * 3 + 1,
                    1
                ) - CURRENT_DATE
            )
            WHEN release_priority = 3 THEN ABS(
                MAKE_DATE(CAST(raw_release_date AS INT), 1, 1) - CURRENT_DATE
            )
            ELSE 0
        END
)
SELECT *
FROM deduplicated
ORDER BY
    release_priority,
    CASE
        WHEN release_priority = 1 THEN release_date - CURRENT_DATE
        WHEN release_priority = 2 THEN ABS(
            MAKE_DATE(
                CAST(SPLIT_PART(raw_release_date, ' ', 2) AS INT),
                (CAST(SUBSTRING(raw_release_date FROM 2 FOR 1) AS INT) - 1) * 3 + 1,
                1
            ) - CURRENT_DATE
        )
        WHEN release_priority = 3 THEN ABS(
            MAKE_DATE(CAST(raw_release_date AS INT), 1, 1) - CURRENT_DATE
        )
        ELSE 0
    END
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: ONE: BACKEND QUERY
nodes.notes:
1. Get active organisations matching the name.
2.Get their preferred product releases.
3. Today is included or excluded 
3. Keep only upcoming or announced releases.
4. Rank them by how specific and soon they are.
5. Return the closest one (or however many you specify).

NOTE:
- Prioritize release_date field, if null use raw_release_date field
- Get the data that is closest today (today excluded) 
- raw_release_date prioritization in order (Q1 2026, 2026, Coming soon, To be announced)

nodes.name: ONE: MADMIN RETURN FORMAT
nodes.notes: - Get the data from previous node (Backend Query) and Loop node for matching

nodes.name: ONE: CHECK IF NOT EMPTY
nodes.notes: - Check if organization_name field is not empty

value.madmin_earliest_release_date: ={{    $json.products.map(p => {     if (p.release_date) {       const d = new Date(p.release_date);       return d.getUTCDate().toString().padStart(2, '0') + ' ' +              d.toLocaleString('en-GB', { month: 'short', timeZone: 'UTC' }) + ' ' +              d.getUTCFullYear();     } else {       return p.raw_release_date;     }   }).filter(Boolean).join(', ') }}

nodes.name: CHECK DATA LIMIT
nodes.notes: - Check what data limit is

nodes.name: LIST
nodes.notes:
- Get the List sheet

- Check if the status is active

nodes.name: CHECK INPUT
nodes.notes: - Check if the user type "Run" if yes get the data in sheet, if no, stop the workflow.

nodes.name: TRIGGER
nodes.notes:
- This automation will run when the user types 'Run' 

- This form has two selections: Data Limt and Today

nodes.name: EDIT LIST COLUMN
nodes.notes: - Proceed only the row_number, organization_name, portal column

nodes.name: ONE: REQUEST TO STEAM
nodes.notes: request to ajaxgetfilteredrecommendations to return the upcoming game release of the organization

nodes.name: ONE: SPLIT PORTAL
nodes.notes: trimmed the portal into two: portal and name to pass into the http

nodes.name: ONE: PICK A RANDOM USER-AGENT
nodes.notes: randomize user-agent

nodes.name: ONE: GET THE RESPONSE DATA FROM STEAM
nodes.notes: get the data from validate steam portal node, add a limit, and check if the org has an upcoming game release

                        ELSE TRUE

            WHEN b.release_date IS NULL
                AND b.raw_release_date ~* '(to\s+be\s+announced|tba|tbd)'
                AND (
                    CASE

                        THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(b.raw_release_date FROM '\d{4}') AS INT) >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
                        ELSE TRUE
                    END
                )
                THEN 5
            ELSE NULL
        END AS release_priority
    FROM base b
    JOIN best_match bm ON b.name_match_priority = bm.best_priority
),
deduplicated AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (product_id) *
    FROM classified
    WHERE release_priority IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY
        product_id,
        release_priority,
        CASE
            WHEN release_priority = 1 THEN release_date - CURRENT_DATE
            WHEN release_priority = 2 THEN ABS(

                    CAST(SPLIT_PART(raw_release_date, ' ', 2) AS INT),

FROM deduplicated

                CAST(SPLIT_PART(raw_release_date, ' ', 2) AS INT),
                (CAST(SUBSTRING(raw_release_date FROM 2 FOR 1) AS INT) - 1) * 3 + 1,
